prompt.text:
# WorkforceAP Sprint: Partner Portal + Member Assignment + Notifications The full spec is in `cursor-sprint-partner-portal.md` at the repo root. Read it first, then implement all 5 features: --- ## Feature 1: Partner Portal (Scoped Dashboard) ### Schema — add to `prisma/schema.prisma` New model: ```prisma model PartnerUser { id String @id @default(uuid()) partnerId String @map("partner_id") userId String @unique @map("user_id") createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") partner Partner @relation(fields: [partnerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade) user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade) @@index([partnerId]) @@map("partner_users") } ``` Add `partnerUsers PartnerUser[]` to `Partner` model. Add `partnerUser PartnerUser?` to `User` model. Run: `npx prisma migrate dev --name add_partner_users` Also add optional partner notification prefs to `Partner` model: ```prisma notifyOnEnrollment Boolean @default(true) @map("notify_on_enrollment") notifyOnCourse Boolean @default(true) @map("notify_on_course") notifyOnCertified Boolean @default(true) @map("notify_on_certified") notifyOnPlaced Boolean @default(true) @map("notify_on_placed") ``` Run migration: `npx prisma migrate dev --name add_partner_notification_prefs` ### New Pages **`app/admin/partners/[id]/page.tsx`** — Admin Partner Detail - Partner name, contact info, counselors - Table: referred members (via PartnerReferral) with Name, Program, Progress %, Status, Enrolled Date - Stats: Total referred · Active · Completions · Placements - "Invite Partner User" button → sends invite email to partner.contactEmail - Toggle notification preferences (notifyOnEnrollment, notifyOnCourse, etc.) **`app/(portal)/partner/page.tsx`** — Partner Dashboard - Route guard: require PartnerUser record (add `isPartner(userId)` to `lib/auth/roles.ts`) - Stats row: Total Members · Active · Completed · Placed - Members table: Name | Program | Progress | Last Active | Status - Recent Activity: last 10 milestone events for their members - ALL queries scoped to partner.id from PartnerUser.partnerId — no cross-partner data **`app/(portal)/partner/members/[id]/page.tsx`** — Partner Member Detail (read-only) - Show: name, program, course completion checklist, milestones, placement status - Hide: contact info, assessment scores, benefit requests, full profile ### Auth helpers (`lib/auth/roles.ts`) - `isPartner(userId): Promise` - `getPartnerForUser(userId): Promise` ### Nav - Add "Partner Portal" link visible only when role === partner - Partner portal layout shows "Partner View" indicator in header --- ## Feature 2: Member → Partner Assignment (Admin Side) **`app/admin/members/new/AddMemberWizard.tsx`** - Add partner referral field to existing wizard (dropdown: "Referred by partner?") - Fetch active partners from `/api/admin/partners` - On member creation, if partner selected → create `PartnerReferral` record **`app/admin/members/[id]/page.tsx`** - Add "Partner Assignment" section - Show current partner (if any), allow change - Call `PATCH /api/admin/members/[id]/partner` **`app/admin/members/page.tsx` / `MembersTable`** - Add "Partner" column showing partner name (if assigned) - Make filterable by partner **`app/api/admin/members/[id]/partner/route.ts`** — new route ```typescript // PATCH: { partnerId: string | null } // Upserts or deletes PartnerReferral record ``` --- ## Feature 3: Email Notifications for Partners **`lib/notifications/partner-notify.ts`** — new file ```typescript // sendPartnerMilestoneEmail(memberId: string, milestone: 'program_enrolled' | 'course_completed' | 'certified' | 'placed', details: { programTitle?: string; courseName?: string; certName?: string; employerName?: string }) // 1. Look up PartnerReferral for memberId → get partnerId // 2. Look up Partner with notifyOn* prefs and contactEmail/contactName // 3. If notify pref is true, send email via existing email provider in the app ``` Email template: - Subject: `[WorkforceAP] Update on [First Name] — [Milestone]` - Body: clean, specific, links to partner portal Wire calls into existing mutation points: - Program enrollment → `sendPartnerMilestoneEmail(userId, 'program_enrolled', ...)` - Course completion → `sendPartnerMilestoneEmail(userId, 'course_completed', ...)` - Certification → `sendPartnerMilestoneEmail(userId, 'certified', ...)` - Placement → `sendPartnerMilestoneEmail(userId, 'placed', ...)` --- ## Feature 4: How It Works — Copy + CTA + Mobile Fix File: `app/how-it-works/page.tsx` Replace step descriptions with these exactly: Phase 1 — Get Started: - Step 1 Apply: "Fill out a 5-minute online form. We'll reach out within 48 hours." - Step 2 Overview: "Meet with a counselor to review programs, timelines, and what to expect." - Step 3 Interview: "A 30-minute one-on-one to confirm you're a fit and answer your questions." Phase 2 — Build Your Future: - Step 4 Membership: "Join at no cost. All accepted members receive free access to resources, support, and training." - Step 5 Assessment: "Skills and goals evaluation to match you with the right career path." - Step 6 Workforce Readiness: "Soft skills, job search basics, and workplace expectations — the foundation employers require." - Step 7 Resources: "Loaner laptop program, resume support, community network, and on-demand tools." Phase 3 — Launch Your Career: - Step 8 Training: "Industry certification courses taught by certified instructors or approved online platforms." - Step 9 Certify: "Earn credentials recognized by employers — CompTIA, AWS, Google, Microsoft, and more." - Step 10 Job Placement Assistance: "Resume review, interview prep, employer connections, and job search support until you land." - Step 11 Better Life & Future: "A career that pays. Graduates average $42K+ starting salary in their new field." Add bottom CTA section before Footer: ```tsx

Ready to Start?

Applications take 5 minutes. Counselors reach out within 48 hours.

Apply Now — It's Free
``` Fix mobile layout in `css/main.css`: ```css @media (max-width: 768px) { .phase-bg-number { font-size: 6rem; opacity: 0.06; } .phase-steps { gap: 1rem; } } ``` --- ## Feature 5: Bug Fixes **Bug 1 — CSS Visibility** (`css/main.css`): Verify or apply (if PR #57 not merged): - `.trust-logos img` → `filter: brightness(0.95); opacity: 0.92;` (remove grayscale) - `.partner-logos-small img` → same - `.partners-grid img` → same - `.photo-highlight-overlay` → gradient alpha `0.72 → 0.45 → 0.30` **Bug 2 — Referral Source Fallback** (client-side application form): Ensure fallback array includes all partners: ```typescript const FALLBACK_REFERRAL_SOURCES = [ 'Workforce Solutions', 'Texas Workforce Commission (TWC)', 'Austin Area Urban League', 'African American Youth Harvest Foundation', '211 Texas', 'Community Organization', 'Flyer or Brochure', 'WorkforceAP Counselor', 'Other', ]; ``` **Bug 3 — Partner Empty State** (`app/admin/partners/page.tsx`): Update empty state description to: "Partner organizations refer candidates to WorkforceAP. Each partner gets their own portal login, referral tracking, and milestone notifications for their members." --- ## Anti-Slop Rules (Mandatory) - NO buzzwords: revolutionary, seamless, cutting-edge, holistic, world-class, innovative - NO vague benefits — use specific numbers and timelines - NO placeholder text - Partner emails must be specific and direct - WorkforceAP tone: Direct, practical, specific, respectful ## Definition of Done - [ ] PartnerUser schema added, migration runs - [ ] /admin/partners/[id] shows referred members + analytics - [ ] /partner portal route works scoped to partner only - [ ] Member add wizard has partner assignment - [ ] Members table has Partner column - [ ] PATCH /api/admin/members/[id]/partner works - [ ] sendPartnerMilestoneEmail wired to 4 events - [ ] How It Works copy updated (all 11 steps) - [ ] How It Works bottom CTA added - [ ] How It Works mobile fix applied - [ ] CSS visibility bugs fixed - [ ] Referral source fallback complete - [ ] npm run build passes (no TypeScript errors)
